enrichment.schedule_details: The Lanka Premier League (LPL) 2026 will be held from July 10 to August 5 across four venues in Colombo, Pallekele, and Dambulla. A total of 24 matches, including 20 league and 4 knockouts, will be played. The online portal for foreign player registration opens on May 4, 2026.
enrichment.teams_mentioned: Colombo Strikers, Galle Gladiators, Kandy Falcons, Dambulla Sixers, Jaffna Kings
